task_completion.description: The initial bcp_training.odp presentation is opened in LibreOffice Impress.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress window is open, and the title bar or active document shows 'bcp_training.odp'. The initial 6 slides should be visible in the left slide pane.

task_completion.description: The presentation is expanded to at least 12 slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide pane on the left side of the Impress window or the slide sorter view shows a total slide count of 12 or more.

task_completion.description: An emergency response process flowchart with at least 8 connected shapes is added to a slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide contains a flowchart diagram. Count the individual shapes (rectangles, diamonds, ovals, etc.) to ensure there are at least 8, and verify they are connected by lines or arrows.

task_completion.description: At least one data chart (e.g., RTO/RPO comparison) is included in the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide contains a native chart object (such as a bar chart, column chart, or pie chart). It may display data comparing RTO and RPO or other BCP metrics.

task_completion.description: Speaker notes are added to at least 8 slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Across the screenshot trajectory, text is visible in the 'Click to add notes' section at the bottom of the Normal view, or in the Notes view, for at least 8 distinct slides.

task_completion.description: The final presentation is exported as a PDF to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window shows 'bcp_training.pdf' in the /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/ directory, or a PDF viewer is open showing the exported presentation.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to edit the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Impress menus, adding slides, inserting shapes/charts, and typing text, rather than using terminal commands to modify the file.

integrity.description: The flowchart and chart are created using native Impress tools, not pasted as static images.
integrity.visual_evidence: During the creation process, selection handles, chart data tables, or drawing toolbars are visible, indicating the objects are native and editable.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported using the GUI, not a headless command line utility.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Export as PDF' dialog box in LibreOffice Impress is visible in the trajectory, rather than a terminal window executing a conversion command like 'soffice --headless'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial presentation has exactly 6 slides. Authentic BCP terminology includes RTO (Recovery Time Objective), RPO (Recovery Point Objective), BIA (Business Impact Analysis), alternate sites (Hot/Warm/Cold), and testing methods (Tabletop/Functional/Full-Scale). The task requires expanding the deck to at least 12 slides, adding a flowchart with 8+ connected shapes, adding 1+ data chart, writing speaker notes on 8+ slides, and exporting to PDF. These numeric requirements are task-specific goals.
